message:
refactor(plan): Simplify async test helpers using Select combinator

Revert to using the Select combinator for race semantics instead of
manual try_join polling loops:

src/plan/mod.rs:
- Remove await_handle() helper (unnecessary complexity)
- Restore join_branch() to use direct handle.join(cx) calls
- Restore race_branch() to use Select combinator for racing
- Cleaner code that relies on existing well-tested combinator

tests/phase0_verification.rs:
- Expand test coverage with additional verification scenarios
- Add more edge cases for observational equivalence testing

The Select combinator already handles the polling semantics correctly,
making the manual try_join() loop redundant. This simplification
improves maintainability while preserving test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
